/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/StellarVPN.dir/StellarVPN_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StellarVPN.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StellarVPN.dir/vpn_client.cpp.o -o StellarVPN  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
